description: Composition Blue denim tunic made of 100% cotton, has mandarin collar with a V-neck, buttoned placket, pin-tucks along the placket, three quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm Wash dark colours separately Delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron if needed Crafted from fashion's favourite fabric, wear this to office on fun Fridays with leggings or form fitted denims. Style this with ballet flats, the best option for day-to-night appeal and comfort. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
